data.name: I'd Lowkey Simp for that Bussin Femboy at Work
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy, Femboy on ​Male

A new job with new opportunities... 💦

​Though the assignment won't be easy. Being a proper simp takes dedication and hard work. Make sure to give it 110% and the reward will be well worth the effort.

It's risky though, HR and floor managers lurking about, but perhaps an opening will present itself. 🍑

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Choose to be top or bottom

  • H-Scenes

  • ~11K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
